commit_scope: Add sibling-native BML file scanning and whole-file companion shell parsing for container-Rule.bml and BMF-grammar.bml.

local_validation.notes: Native BML scanner preserved previous include and primitive-Cut proofs at 4095 and 33554431. New companion shell proof scans and parses container-Rule.bml and BMF-grammar.bml as whole files with result 1048575.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Large original BML companion source files can now be scanned without TypeScript stack overflow and parsed as whole source files into package/import/class shell components.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-companion-shell-source-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: Large-file scanner and source shell parsing are proven locally; CI and production deployment proof are pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-kernel-go/main.go, form/form-kernel-rust/src/main.rs, and form/form-kernel-ts/src/kernel.ts expose sibling-native bml_scan_file to avoid Form recursion stack overflow while scanning large .bml files.

form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk routes bml-source-scan-file through the native scanner, adds single-segment package parsing, and adds balanced/eof class shell parsing for companion source acceptance.

form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-companion-shell-source-proof.fk reads container-Rule.bml and BMF-grammar.bml directly from docs/field/urs/artifacts/master-thesis-2000/companion/source-samples and proves whole-file shell parsing.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md keeps full class-body/member/constructor/method lowering as an explicit remaining gap.
